def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # adv20: 20-day rolling mean of volume
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)

    # volume / adv20
    vol_ratio = pl.col('volume') / adv20

    # decay_linear(volume / adv20, 9)
    decayed = decay_linear(vol_ratio, window=9)

    # rank(decay_linear(...)) cross-section
    rank_decayed = rank(decayed).over('date')

    # 1 - rank_decayed
    one_minus_rank = 1 - rank_decayed

    # delta(close, 7)
    close_delta = delta(pl.col('close'), periods=7)

    # inner product: delta(close, 7) * (1 - rank(decay_linear(...)))
    inner_product = close_delta * one_minus_rank

    # rank(inner_product) cross-section
    rank_inner = rank(inner_product).over('date')

    # -1 * rank_inner
    neg_rank = -1 * rank_inner

    # sum(returns, 250)
    sum_returns = rolling_sum(pl.col('returns'), window=250)

    # rank(sum(returns, 250)) cross-section
    rank_sum_returns = rank(sum_returns).over('date')

    # 1 + rank_sum_returns
    one_plus_rank = 1 + rank_sum_returns

    # final factor
    factor = neg_rank * one_plus_rank

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
